creation.source_prompt_summary: Black-and-white hand-drawn manga-sketch fan art with exactly one Naruto, Kakashi, Yamato, and Tsunade as Hokage posing as a group beside the exact title Naruto Codex Deliberation Council.
edit_history: Version 1 depicted the four-method council as a colorful action composition with four Naruto figures.
Version 2 redrew the banner as a monochrome posed portrait with exactly one Naruto, Kakashi, Yamato, and Tsunade.
Version 2 regenerated the integrated title to preserve a clear space between CODEX and DELIBERATION and removed all non-title glyphs.
Version 3 restores the earlier monochrome portrait explicitly selected by the user, including its compact CODEX/DELIBERATION lettering and Fifth-generation sleeve marking.

checks: Kakashi, Yamato, and Tsunade present exactly once
all four characters pose without tasks, tools, action, or power effects
strictly black-and-white manga sketch and doodle treatment
known_visual_notes: CODEX and DELIBERATION use tightly joined lettering in the user-selected composition.
Tsunade's sleeve includes the selected Fifth-generation character marking.
